message:
Enhance jfp CLI commands

- list: Add --limit flag, improved table with tags, auto-JSON for non-TTY
- search: Default limit 20, numbered human output, JSON wrapper with query/count
- show: Markdown-style output with whenToUse/tips/examples, auto-JSON
- export: Add --all for bulk export, write to files, --stdout option
- render: New command with --VAR=value, --context, --stdin, --max-context

Closes beads: 08e, b6w, 768, 1ee, mn4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
